# Simplified nominal 6 MV clinical LINAC photon pencil beam in a water phantom.
# A narrow incident electron beam strikes a tungsten target to generate a
# bremsstrahlung beam, which is a better clinical proxy than a direct
# monoenergetic photon source while still keeping the setup lightweight.
#
# Generated by scripts/run_linac_6mv_sfrt.py

s:Ts/G4DataDirectory = "__G4_DATA_DIR__"

s:Ph/Default/Type = "Geant4_Modular"
sv:Ph/Default/Modules = __PHYSICS_MODULES__
d:Ph/Default/CutForGamma = __CUT_GAMMA_MM__ mm
d:Ph/Default/CutForElectron = __CUT_ELECTRON_MM__ mm
d:Ph/Default/CutForPositron = __CUT_POSITRON_MM__ mm

s:Ge/World/Material  = "G4_AIR"
d:Ge/World/HLX       = __WORLD_HLX_CM__ cm
d:Ge/World/HLY       = __WORLD_HLY_CM__ cm
d:Ge/World/HLZ       = __WORLD_HLZ_CM__ cm
b:Ge/World/Invisible = "True"

s:Ge/BeamOrigin/Type   = "Group"
s:Ge/BeamOrigin/Parent = "World"
d:Ge/BeamOrigin/TransX = 0.0 cm
d:Ge/BeamOrigin/TransY = 0.0 cm
d:Ge/BeamOrigin/TransZ = __SOURCE_Z_CM__ cm
d:Ge/BeamOrigin/RotX   = 0.0 deg
d:Ge/BeamOrigin/RotY   = 0.0 deg
d:Ge/BeamOrigin/RotZ   = 0.0 deg

s:Ge/Target/Type        = "TsBox"
s:Ge/Target/Parent      = "World"
s:Ge/Target/Material    = "G4_W"
d:Ge/Target/HLX         = __TARGET_HLX_CM__ cm
d:Ge/Target/HLY         = __TARGET_HLY_CM__ cm
d:Ge/Target/HLZ         = __TARGET_HLZ_CM__ cm
d:Ge/Target/TransX      = 0.0 cm
d:Ge/Target/TransY      = 0.0 cm
d:Ge/Target/TransZ      = __TARGET_CENTER_Z_CM__ cm
d:Ge/Target/RotX        = 0.0 deg
d:Ge/Target/RotY        = 0.0 deg
d:Ge/Target/RotZ        = 0.0 deg
d:Ge/Target/MaxStepSize = __MAX_STEP_TARGET_MM__ mm

s:Ge/Phantom/Type        = "TsBox"
s:Ge/Phantom/Parent      = "World"
s:Ge/Phantom/Material    = "G4_WATER"
d:Ge/Phantom/HLX         = __PHANTOM_HLX_CM__ cm
d:Ge/Phantom/HLY         = __PHANTOM_HLY_CM__ cm
d:Ge/Phantom/HLZ         = __PHANTOM_HLZ_CM__ cm
d:Ge/Phantom/TransX      = 0.0 cm
d:Ge/Phantom/TransY      = 0.0 cm
d:Ge/Phantom/TransZ      = __PHANTOM_CENTER_Z_CM__ cm
d:Ge/Phantom/RotX        = 0.0 deg
d:Ge/Phantom/RotY        = 0.0 deg
d:Ge/Phantom/RotZ        = 0.0 deg
d:Ge/Phantom/MaxStepSize = __MAX_STEP_PHANTOM_MM__ mm
i:Ge/Phantom/XBins       = __XBINS__
i:Ge/Phantom/YBins       = __YBINS__
i:Ge/Phantom/ZBins       = __ZBINS__

s:Sc/Dose3D/Quantity                  = "DoseToWater"
s:Sc/Dose3D/Component                 = "Phantom"
s:Sc/Dose3D/OutputType                = "CSV"
s:Sc/Dose3D/OutputFile                = "__OUTPUT_STEM__"
s:Sc/Dose3D/IfOutputFileAlreadyExists = "Overwrite"
b:Sc/Dose3D/OutputToConsole           = "False"

s:So/MySource/Type                     = "Beam"
s:So/MySource/Component                = "BeamOrigin"
s:So/MySource/BeamParticle             = "e-"
d:So/MySource/BeamEnergy               = __INCIDENT_ELECTRON_ENERGY_MEV__ MeV
u:So/MySource/BeamEnergySpread         = __ENERGY_SPREAD_REL__
s:So/MySource/BeamPositionDistribution = "Gaussian"
s:So/MySource/BeamPositionCutoffShape  = "Ellipse"
d:So/MySource/BeamPositionCutoffX      = __BEAM_POSITION_CUTOFF_X_MM__ mm
d:So/MySource/BeamPositionCutoffY      = __BEAM_POSITION_CUTOFF_Y_MM__ mm
d:So/MySource/BeamPositionSpreadX      = __BEAM_SIGMA_X_MM__ mm
d:So/MySource/BeamPositionSpreadY      = __BEAM_SIGMA_Y_MM__ mm
s:So/MySource/BeamAngularDistribution  = "Gaussian"
d:So/MySource/BeamAngularCutoffX       = __BEAM_ANGULAR_CUTOFF_MRAD__ mrad
d:So/MySource/BeamAngularCutoffY       = __BEAM_ANGULAR_CUTOFF_MRAD__ mrad
d:So/MySource/BeamAngularSpreadX       = __BEAM_ANGULAR_SPREAD_X_MRAD__ mrad
d:So/MySource/BeamAngularSpreadY       = __BEAM_ANGULAR_SPREAD_Y_MRAD__ mrad
i:So/MySource/NumberOfHistoriesInRun   = __N_HISTORIES__

i:Ts/NumberOfThreads            = __N_THREADS__
i:Ts/Seed                       = __SEED__
i:Ts/RunVerbosity               = 0
i:Ts/ShowHistoryCountAtInterval = __SHOW_HISTORY_INTERVAL__
b:Ts/PauseBeforeQuit            = "False"
